Uttar Pradesh Combined Agriculture and T.official_note: Verified official UPCATET portal (run by Banda University of Agriculture & Technology, coordinating 5 UP agri universities). Replaces the wrong/generic upcatet.net. Publishes result/counselling/seat-allotment lists during counselling (results tentative 30 June 2026); cutoffs released at counselling, not as a static page.

Uttar Pradesh Combined Paramedical Entra.official_note: Verified official CPET page of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University UP (abvmuup). Specific exam page; merit list/counselling are run on this body's portal. More specific than the bare homepage.

Uttar Pradesh Paramedical Entrance Test.official_note: Same UP paramedical admission conducted by Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University UP (CPET). Verified official CPET page; merit-list/counselling handled by this body. Note: from 2026 the body indicated CPET may be replaced by class-12-marks-based paramedical counselling, but abvmuup remains the official body.

Uttar Pradesh State Entrance Examination.official_note: Verified official NIC UPTAC OR-CR portal (successor to UPSEE/AKTU admissions). Lists B.Tech/UG/PG/NATA opening & closing ranks 2025 by round/category. Authoritative cutoff source.
BHMCT admission is conducted through the same UPTAC (AKTU) counselling. Verified official NIC OR-CR portal carries UG opening/closing ranks including BHMCT. Authoritative.

Vellore Institute of Technology Design E.official_note: VIT B.Des admission (via VIT-DAT design aptitude test / UCEED + portfolio + interview). Verified official VIT B.Des admissions page. VIT does NOT publish design entrance cutoffs/closing ranks officially; selection is interview/portfolio based, so no official cutoff page exists.

Vellore Institute of Technology Engineer.official_note: Verified official VITEEE exam/admissions site. VIT does NOT officially release VITEEE cutoffs/closing ranks (counselling uses internal fee-category ranks 1-5); only third-party portals publish indicative cutoffs. This is the authoritative exam-body site.
